description: Assess the hepatic lesion on the loaded contrast-enhanced abdominal CT for thermal ablation suitability. Measure lesion dimensions, distances to hepatic vein, portal vein, and liver capsule, and identify the Couinaud segment. Classify ablation suitability and propose a probe entry point if feasible. Save measurements to ~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/lesion_measurements.mrk.json and report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/ablation_report.json with fields: lesion_dimensions_mm, max_dimension_mm, distance_to_hepatic_vein_mm, distance_to_portal_vein_mm, distance_to_capsule_mm, liver_segment, subcapsular, suitability_classification, rationale, proposed_entry
